name: Parsnips with Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fresh parsnips - scraped and sliced
1/4 cup Toasted almonds - slivered and blanched
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook parsnips in boiling salted water 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain well.
2. Mash the parsnips.
3. Add egg, butter, nutmeg, and pepper; stir well.
4. Spoon the mixture into an ungreased 1 quart casserole.
5. Sprinkle the top evenly with toasted almonds.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
